void.string:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xalan="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:datetime="http://exslt.org/dates-and-times" xmlns:math="http://exslt.org/math" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform" xmlns:lxslt="http://xml.apache.org/xslt" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xmlns:java="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:set="http://exslt.org/sets" exclude-result-prefixes="xalan java lxslt" xmlns:ns4="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" xmlns:ns1="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:ns2="http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Output" xmlns:AppendZero="AppendZero" xmlns:EnDe="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:MD5Hex="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Md5UniCode="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:Remove="Remove" xmlns:ReplaceText="ReplaceText" xmlns:StringLength="StringLength" xmlns:dateConversion="dateConversion" xmlns:myext="myext" xmlns:replace="replace" xmlns:replaceStr="http://xml.apache.org/xslt/java" xmlns:rounding="rounding" xmlns:sringindex="sringindex" xmlns:strings="strings" xmlns:stringtext="stringtext" xmlns:truncateString="truncateString" extension-element-prefixes="datetime set math AppendZero EnDe MD5Hex Md5UniCode Remove ReplaceText StringLength dateConversion myext replace replaceStr rounding sringindex strings stringtext truncateString"> <xsl:import href="GLOBAL_FUNCLET_PATH"></xsl:import> <xsl:output method="xml" indent="yes" encoding="UTF-8" xalan:indent-amount="2" omit-xml-declaration="no"></xsl:output> <xsl:variable name="document" select="/"></xsl:variable> <xsl:variable name="document_IN_PORT" select="document('IN_PORT')"></xsl:variable> <xsl:template match="/"> <AccountStmtRp> <ErrorCode> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns1:GetStatementResponse/ns1:status/ns1:code"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorCode> <ErrorMsg> <xsl:value-of select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns1:GetStatementResponse/ns1:status/ns1:message"></xsl:value-of> </ErrorMsg> <ListTxn> <xsl:for-each select="$document_IN_PORT/ns2:Envelope/ns2:Body/ns1:GetStatementResponse/ns1:transactions/ns1:transaction"><xsl:variable name="pos" select="position()"/> <TxnDetail><TxnCcy> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:currency"></xsl:value-of> </TxnCcy> <Txntype> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:txnType"></xsl:value-of> </Txntype> <TxnContent> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(starts-with(./ns3:bakongDesc,'AC-'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:txnTypeDescription,' Fee ')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(starts-with(./ns3:bakongDesc,'SVGATE'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:txnTypeDescription,' from Mobile Banking ')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(starts-with(./ns3:txnTypeDescription,'PP'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:bakongDesc,'')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string-length(./ns3:bakongDesc)!=('0'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:bakongDesc,'')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:txnTypeDescription,' ',./ns3:bakongDesc)"></xsl:value-of>
</xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </TxnContent> <LastId> <xsl:value-of select = "position()" /> </LastId> <DrCr> <xsl:value-of select="./ns1:drCr"></xsl:value-of> </DrCr><TxnAmount> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:amount"></xsl:value-of> </TxnAmount> <TxnDate> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:trxDt"></xsl:value-of> </TxnDate> <TxnRefNo> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:reference"></xsl:value-of> </TxnRefNo> <DrAcctNo> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:debitAcc,'USD')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:debitAcc,'000001966')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001578')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(./ns3:debitAcc)=('000001558')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:debitAcc"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </DrAcctNo> <CrAcctName> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001966')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001578')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:txnTypeDescription,'BKG Outward Transfer')">
<xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:acboCrName,'Account No:',./ns3:acboCrAcc)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when>
<xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:cbsCrName"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </CrAcctName> <DrAcctName> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:debitAcc,'000001966')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001578')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:cbsDrName"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </DrAcctName> <CrAcctNo> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'USD')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001966')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="starts-with(./ns3:creditAcc,'000001578')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(./ns3:creditAcc)=('000001558')"> <xsl:value-of select="''"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:creditAcc"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </CrAcctNo> <TxnTittle> <xsl:variable name="if0"> <xsl:choose> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypeDescription)=('Mobile Banking FT') and string-length(./ns3:drCr)=('+') and string-length(./ns3:cbsCrName)!=('0'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Received From ',./ns3:cbsDrName)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypeDescription)=('Mobile Banking FT') and string-length(./ns3:Credit)=('0') and string-length(./ns3:cbsCrName)!=('0'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Transfer To ',./ns3:cbsCrName)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypeDescription)=('Mobile Banking FT') and string-length(./ns3:Credit)=('0') and string-length(./ns3:cbsCrName)=('0') and string(./ns3:bakongDesc)!=('CBC fee charge#'))"> <xsl:value-of select="'Topup to e-Wallet'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypeDescription)=('Mobile Banking FT') and string-length(./ns3:Credit)=('0') and string-length(./ns3:cbsCrName)=('0') and string(./ns3:bakongDesc)=('CBC fee charge#'))"> <xsl:value-of select="'CBC Fee Charge'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string-length(./ns3:txnTypeDescription)=('0'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:description,' ',./ns3:bakongDesc)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(starts-with(./ns3:bakongDesc,'AC-'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:txnTypedescription,' Fee ')"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:description)=('VISA Pay Dr') and starts-with(./ns3:bakongDesc,'SVGATE'))"> <xsl:value-of select="'Credit Card Payment'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypedescription)=('BKG Outward Transfer'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Transfer to Bakong ',./ns3:acboCrName)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypedescription)=('BKG Inwrd Transfer'))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Bakong Cash Deposit from ',./ns3:acbiDrName)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:txnTypedescription)=('Mobile Banking Bills Topup') or (string(./ns3:txnTypedescription)=('PPSolid Wast bill payment')))"> <xsl:value-of select="'Bill Payment'"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:when test="(string(./ns3:description)=('ATM FtMobile Out') and (string(./ns3:creditAcc)=('000286644') or string(./ns3:creditAcc)=('000286645')))"> <xsl:value-of select="concat('Cash by Code at ',./ns3:bakongDesc)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:when> <xsl:otherwise> <xsl:value-of select="concat(./ns3:txnTypedescription,' ',./ns3:bakongDesc)"></xsl:value-of> </xsl:otherwise> </xsl:choose> </xsl:variable> <xsl:value-of select="$if0"></xsl:value-of> </TxnTittle> <TxnValDateTime> <xsl:value-of select="./ns3:trxTime"></xsl:value-of> </TxnValDateTime></TxnDetail> </xsl:for-each> </ListTxn> </AccountStmtRp> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xs:schema elementFormDefault="qualified" targetNamespace="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:sch="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:stat="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:tns="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:xs="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema">
<!-- GetStatementRequest --> <xs:element name="GetStatementRequest"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="username" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="password" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="accountNumber" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="fromDate" type="stat:YYYYMMDDDate"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="toDate" type="stat:YYYYMMDDDate"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<!-- GetStatementResponse --> <xs:element name="GetStatementResponse"> <xs:complexType> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="status" type="stat:statusType"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="transactions" type="stat:transactionList"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:element>
<!-- Status Type with code and message --> <xs:complexType name="statusType"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element name="code" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element name="message" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<!-- Date Format --> <xs:simpleType name="YYYYMMDDDate"> <xs:restriction base="xs:string"> <xs:pattern value="[0-9]{4}(0[1-9]|1[0-2])(0[1-9]|[12][0-9]|3[01])"/> <xs:length value="8"/> </xs:restriction> </xs:simpleType>
<!-- Transaction List --> <xs:complexType name="transactionList"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="transaction" type="stat:transaction"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType>
<!-- Transaction --> <xs:complexType name="transaction"> <xs:sequence> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="recid" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="bookingDate" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="reference" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="narrative" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="valueDate" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="drCr" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="amount" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="currency" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="description" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="txnType" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="debitAcc" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="creditAcc" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="acboCrAcc" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="acboCrName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="acboDrName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="acbiCrName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="acbiDrName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="bakongDesc" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="trxDt" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="trxTime" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="txnTypeDescription" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cbsCrName" type="xs:string"/> <xs:element minOccurs="0" name="cbsDrName" type="xs:string"/> </xs:sequence> </xs:complexType> </xs:schema>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <xsd:schema xmlns:wsdl="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/" xmlns:tns="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:sch="http://cpbank.com/statement" xmlns:soap="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/wsdl/soap/" xmlns:ftns="http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Output" xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema" targetNamespace="http://cpbank.com/statement/GetStatement/Output"> <xsd:import namespace="http://cpbank.com/statement"/> <xsd:element name="Envelope"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element ref="ftns:Header"/> <xsd:element ref="ftns:Body"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Header"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence/> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> <xsd:element name="Body"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element ref="sch:GetStatementResponse"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>

<xsd:schema xmlns:xsd="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema"> <xsd:element name="AccountStmtRp"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorCode" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="ErrorMsg" type="xsd:string"/>
<xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="ListTxn"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0" name="TxnDetail"> <xsd:complexType> <xsd:sequence> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="DrCr" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="TxnCcy" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnContent" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="LastId " type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="1" name="TxnAmount" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="TxnDate" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="TxnRefNo" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="DrAcctNo" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="CrAcctNo" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="DrAcctName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="CrAcctName" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="TxnValDateTime" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="TxnTittle" type="xsd:string"/> <xsd:element maxOccurs="1" minOccurs="0" name="Txntype" type="xsd:string"/> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:sequence> </xsd:complexType> </xsd:element> </xsd:schema>
